rag_rules: Place AGREE annex blocks in component implementation scopes for implementation-level signal routing bindings.
Use component type scopes for assumptions and guarantees that reference component ports.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts must be placed in valid AADL scopes corresponding to their semantic level.
Implementation-level bindings should reference subcomponents and connections within the implementation scope.
Assumptions and guarantees for component ports must be placed in component type scopes unless they are implementation-specific.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annex blocks are enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Component type contracts should use visible feature names and relations for assumptions and guarantees.
Implementation contracts should bind to subcomponent ports and connections in the implementation scope.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level bindings in component type scopes.
Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through valid variables.
irrelevant_topics: AGREE validator diagnostics and repair patterns
Model analyst extraction of AADL structure
